title: The Best Blueberry Muffins
ingredients: 1/2 cup butter or margarine, at room temperature
2 1/2 cups fresh blueberries or frozen blueberries
instructions: Grease 18 regular-size muffin cups (or 12 large size muffin cups) or use muffin liners.
In a bowl, mix butter until creamy.
Add sugar and beat until pale and fluffy.
Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition.
Beat in vanilla, baking powder, and salt.
Fold in half of the flour, then half of the milk into the batter.
Fold in the remaining flour and remaining milk.
Sprinkle sugar and nutmeg topping onto each muffin.
Bake for 20 to 30 minutes, until golden brown and springy to touch.
notes: Makes 18 regular-size muffins or 12 large muffins
Can use fresh or frozen blueberries
Butter or margarine should be at room temperature for best mixing results
